title: 9 Signs a Godly Man's Self-Control Is Real, Not Performed
caption:
Performance cracks under pressure. Real self-control doesn't.

It's the fruit of the Spirit, not a willpower trick, and it gets stronger the longer he walks with God, not weaker. Save this and check yourself against it.

#faith #selfcontrol #christianman #godlyman #discipline
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
